data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Additional security layer requiring second verification method.
data.technical_spec: Token or SMS-based authentication to validate user identity.

data.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
data.technical_spec: Encrypts communication using 256-bit keys to protect data integrity.

data.title: Web Application Firewall (WAF)
data.description: Protects against common web application exploits.
data.technical_spec: Analyzes incoming traffic to block malicious traffic based on rules.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Continuous security analysis and vulnerability testing.
data.technical_spec: Conducted via automated tools and periodic manual reviews.

data.title: Data Loss Prevention (DLP)
data.technical_spec: Monitors, detects, and blocks sensitive data while in use, in motion, and at rest.
